C[GuluCat: please dont ban me if i win
C[GuluCat: i guess josekipedia helped a lot did it?
C[mlopezviedma: a bit. some moves I tend to miss... For example, in this joseki I sometimes forget to extend at R7 before ataring
mlopezviedma: It's totally fine on correspondence, don't you think?
mlopezviedma: besides, you got me here with your last move :P
GuluCat: i think position is pretty equal
GuluCat: btw this is not a joseki , if u did search josekipedia, it would say ""trick play""
C[mlopezviedma: Oh, no, I didn't look up this far, just until P4
C[mlopezviedma: I use eidogo, and until there, it is shown as joseki
C[GuluCat: trust me this is a Chinese trick
mlopezviedma: eidogo doesn't mention anything T_T
GuluCat: used this beat a tygem 7d in Costen Open last yr
GuluCat: and lost to xhu98 by 4.5pt
GuluCat: he went so easy on me
GuluCat: it requires extremely extra strength to win less than komi
GuluCat: could u get other helps when it comes into midgame?
mlopezviedma: no, in the case of correspondence, I just try to really think it through. I take my time to play each move
GuluCat: good, then thats fair Lol
mlopezviedma: you don't have to worry about me cheating :)
GuluCat: no ask u said that was not ""cheating""
mlopezviedma: you think consulting some josekis on corr is cheating?
GuluCat: any moves thats not from ur own is considered cheating in my opinion
GuluCat: even including conditional moves and game analysis
mlopezviedma: ah, you don't use analysis on correspondence?
GuluCat: i would prefer not to use them if i create a game
mlopezviedma: that's very interesting, I'll keep that in mind
GuluCat: go might just be a game or an ""interesting game"" in people who are from other countries
mlopezviedma: I mean, I think my moves to use and practice my reading, but I use analysis every once in a while
GuluCat: but in china we treat this as our philosophy
mlopezviedma: I know what you mean
GuluCat: what u couldnt do on real board, is what u are not supposed to do online play
C[GuluCat: u cant play out every move when u are playing in real life, could u?
GuluCat: so why it is legal in correspondence
mlopezviedma: thing is, it's easy to get used to it in correspondence
GuluCat: there is no difference between 2k-8k
GuluCat: if game analysis is abled
mlopezviedma: sure, I know what you mean
mlopezviedma: I always felt weird about that, that's why I was interested in your opinion
GuluCat: thats why a bunch of players on ogs are 3k-1k on corr becauz they avoided mistakes which may occur on blitz & live games
mlopezviedma: I'm opening a go club here where I live, and I want to be a good example of how I want Go to be seen, so I'll avoid analysis for now on
GuluCat: thats my goal of go
GuluCat: how can u be 4d AGA but only 1k on OGS"", this is  a question that i was asked for yrs through
GuluCat: my answer is always ""the evil game analysis !""
mlopezviedma: it's good that you don't care about rank
C[GuluCat: i care about it so much
GuluCat: but care about my real power the most
C[GuluCat: time for bed to me
C[バクガン: if you have sometime will you do a offline review for me after the game?

C[icky: Hi, where r u, in world?
C[icky: I live in central ny state - north northeast if Finger Lakes, city is Syracuse NY
C[mlopezviedma: Great. I would love to go to NY some day
C[icky: How come your font is purple?
mlopezviedma: That's because I'm a moderator on the site
C[icky: Your graphic, did you design it?
mlopezviedma: No, I didn't design it. It's Archlinux's logo https://www.archlinux.org
C[icky: I see... I don't know much about Linux...
C[mlopezviedma: It's not the most popular distribution anyway :)
C[icky: It is winter in Argentina now?
mlopezviedma: No, not where I live
mlopezviedma: About -5°C is the coldest it gets
C[mlopezviedma: We see snow like once every 5 years, and only fro a couple minutes :)
C[icky: Here, an average season, say late November to end of March, we get at least 120 inches of snowfall...
C[mlopezviedma: Same as here, if you travel about 1000km south
C[icky: Perhaps 50 miles north of Syracuse is an area called the Tug Hill Plateau and they get probably double (at least) what we get in the city
icky: Here, we all get what is referred to as ""lake effect"" snow off of Lake Ontario (one of the Great Lakes)
C[mlopezviedma: SO, although it's not technically snowing, you'll see snow deposited everywhere, right?

C[icky: NO, it is snowing - lake effect snow happens when the cold Canadian air from the North blows over the ""warm"" humid air above the lake resulting in tremendous amounts of snow. Often, if you drive north from Syracuse, it is like coming to a ""curtain"" - on one side not snowing and as you pass thru the curtain you can see barely a few feet in front of you.
C[icky: Tell me about your new graphic...
C[mlopezviedma: Oh, it's just a cartoon for adults, called robot chicken
C[icky: I work at an animation studio...
